step-001-helloworld/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration.
step-001-helloworld/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; using it with Java 21 causes compilation errors or runtime incompatibilities due to removed APIs and stricter module system enforcement.

step-001-helloworld/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
step-001-helloworld/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile against Java 21; leaving it at 17 would result in incorrect bytecode version or failure to utilize Java 21 features if enforced by build plugins.
